calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Enforce The Parties Settlement Agreement Ccp 664.6 And For Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Hoa T. Cooc, Esq. In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperances:

Atty. Hoa Cooc of Law Office of Hoa Cooc, (510)268-8063, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party Chak Lung Siu. Atty. Arthur C. Lipton of Law Office of Lipton & Piper, LLP, (415)362-6286, appearing for Defendant and opposing party Mark Wannaviroj.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
PLAINTIFFS CHAK SIU and ANNIE SIU's Motion For An Order To Enforce The Parties Settlement Agreement Ccp 664.6 And For Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Hoa T. Cooc, Esq. In Support Thereof. Plaintiff is ordered to dismiss action. Defendant is ordered to comply with all provisions of the Settlement Agreement dates amended relative to the date of this order. Wackeen v. Malis (2002) 97 Cal.App.4th 429. Modified order signed in open court. See details of scanned order.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported

Notice Of Motion For An Order To Enforce The Parties' Settlement Agreement And For Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS CHAK SIU and ANNIE SIU'S Motion For An Order To Enforce The Parties' Settlement Agreement And For Judgment is Off calendar as to Dept. 302. The matter should be re-set in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
